title: Scheduler heartbeat gaps cause queued tasks to appear stuck
author: airflow-user
body: Tasks remain queued while the scheduler log shows intermittent heartbeat gaps and database pool saturation.
resolution: Maintainers recommended checking scheduler heartbeat duration, database pool sizing, and executor queue pressure before clearing task instances.

title: Zombie task cleanup races with long BigQuery operator retries
author: data-eng
body: Long-running BigQuery tasks are marked as zombie when scheduler heartbeat delays coincide with retries.
resolution: The thread points to tuning zombie detection thresholds and confirming executor heartbeat health rather than repeatedly clearing the DAG.

title: Dataset scheduling emits duplicate downstream refresh after manual retry
author: analytics-platform
body: Manual retry of a producer DAG emitted duplicate dataset events and caused downstream refreshes to run twice.
resolution: Maintainers recommended narrowing rerun scope and checking dataset event deduplication instead of clearing producer and consumer DAGs together.
